scripts.install:all: npm.cmd install --legacy-peer-deps && npm.cmd install --prefix backend --legacy-peer-deps && npm.cmd install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm.cmd run dev --prefix backend" "npm.cmd run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
